reviews.comment:
Excelente atención !!!!
Realmente vale la pena ir, la atención ,la cordialidad y la rapidez difícil encontrar en otra estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service!
It's really worth going; the service, friendliness, and speed are hard to find at other gas stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNGcVotNnd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre excelente la atención destacada y el esmero diario para mantener la limpieza en general del lugar, productos de buena calidad y frescos,
Sigan así siempre ES UN EJEMPLO PARA EL LUGAR

(Translated by Google)
The service is always excellent, and the daily effort to maintain the overall cleanliness of the place is outstanding. The products are high quality and fresh. Keep it up! You are an example for the community.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas Gracias por su comentario agradecernos su visita
